general: Bring photo ID and insurance card

fasting.description: Do not eat or drink anything (including water) for 8 hours before surgery
fasting.exceptions: Take approved medications with small sip of water

transport.description: You MUST arrange for a responsible adult to drive you home. You cannot drive, take public transit, or use ride-sharing alone.

medications.blood_thinners: Stop 5-7 days before surgery unless instructed otherwise
medications.diabetes_meds: Adjust morning dose - your doctor will provide specific instructions
medications.blood_pressure: Take with small sip of water on morning of surgery

arrival.description: Arrive 60 minutes before scheduled surgery time for pre-op preparation

red_flags: Inability to stop blood thinners as instructed
